specific_question: As of August 1, 2025, has Elexion Automotive completed its regional asset-standardization project to unify lifecycle tracking across all its plants?
answer: Yes. According to Elexion Automotive's asset-management bulletin, the company finalized its asset-standardization project on July 25, 2025.
dr_question: By Q3 2026, how can Elexion Automotive apply digital twins enhanced with AI-driven digital engineering capabilities to enable scalable customization of EV models for mid-income families, while maintaining sustainable resource usage and reducing production costs?
